infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Smart Thikana needs camera access to capture photos for your listing and KYC (identity verification).
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Smart Thikana needs photo library access to upload images for your listing and profile.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Smart Thikana needs your location to show nearby rental listings.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Smart Thikana uses Face ID to securely unlock the app.
